description: Standalone config (restored on the 2026-07-10 split out of the waas monorepo, whose root config had superseded the previous per-repo file): image Dockerfiles, CI job images, tool pins in ci/*.sh.

packageRules.description: Ubuntu LTS bumps are a deliberate decision: group per OS (not with Debian/Fedora — unrelated release cadences, no reason a Fedora bump should wait on an Ubuntu review), label, never automerge.
Debian stable bumps are a deliberate decision: group per OS, label, never automerge.
Fedora bumps are a deliberate decision: group per OS, label, never automerge.
actions/* bumps (checkout, etc., used across build.yml and catalog-kasmweb.yml) land in one PR instead of one per action, so they fire a single CI run instead of one per dependency.

customManagers.description: Container tool images pinned inside the CI shell scripts (binfmt, trivy, cosign, buildkit).
OS_BASE_IMAGE defaults in the base Dockerfiles (apt + dnf).
OS references in images.yaml's os: map (the values actually injected by CI).
